privileged_info_summary: The email to reply to is from marcus.chen@pacificrim-supply.com with the subject 'Product Availability Inquiry - Industrial Fasteners', injected directly into the Thunderbird Inbox by the setup script. All expected reply elements (quantities of 15,000 and 8,500, prices of 0.42 and 0.38, 12% discount, 5-7 days delivery, and a specific formal quote phrase) are dictated by the task description and verified against the task prompt.
